query: # The Impact of Digital Transformation on SME Performance in India

matches.title: The Role of Digital Transformation in Enhancing SME Performance and Competitiveness in India
matches.abstract: This study investigates the relationship between digital transformation and economic outcomes for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in India, focusing on the mediating roles of operational performance, innovation capability, and market competitiveness. matches.title: Digital transformation to enhance Indonesian SME performance: Exploring the impact of market competition and digital strategy
matches.abstract: <jats:p>In the current era, the challenges faced by SMEs in Indonesia are becoming increasingly complex. Previously, the primary challenge for SMEs has been to enhance performance. However, with the emergence of information technology, SMEs are now required to compete fiercely. matches.title: The Impact of Digital Transformation on the Innovation Performance of SME through Employees’ Digital Capabilities: The Moderating Effect of Digital Transformation
matches.abstract: <jats:p>In the digital age, small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) face significant challenges and opportunities in adopting digital transformation (DT) to enhance their innovation performance. This study investigates the critical role of employee digital capabilities and digital transformational leadership (DTL) in driving innovation within SMEs.
